# Reproduces the default layout the app ships with: an irregular
# quadrilateral boundary with a rectangular hole and three drive lines.
# Prior to the entrance-on-face filter, corners where the face edge
# bends away from the spine produced stalls whose entrances dangled
# past the face boundary into an adjacent bay (see the first-quadrant
# corner of the outer boundary).

polygon outer
76.30,0
692.14,0
782.80,654.85
168.78,654.85
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

polygon hole
394.53,251.80
611.14,251.80
613.91,512.33
394.53,512.33
----
hole: 4 vertices

drive-line
930.76,381.06
-42.60,512.33
----
drive-line: 930.76,381.06 -> -42.60,512.33

drive-line partitions
198.60,-53.66
475.79,349.25
----
drive-line: 198.60,-53.66 -> 475.79,349.25 partitions

drive-line partitions
446.56,335.61
930.76,135.52
----
drive-line: 446.56,335.61 -> 930.76,135.52 partitions

set stall_angle_deg=45
----
set stall_angle_deg=45

set stalls_per_face=29
----
set stalls_per_face=29

set use_regions=true
----
set use_regions=true

set min_stalls_per_spine=3
----
set min_stalls_per_spine=3

generate
----
total_stalls: 799

snapshot
----
